THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAHAM, MARY LYNN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 641 O'FARRELL ST, #508, SF, CA $1,962.29 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,962.29, STAYED UNTIL SEP-26-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT FAILS TO MAKE PAYMTS ATTY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $425 & COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $225. MAY BE APPLIED TO ORIGINAL JUDGMT. IF DEFT COMPLIES ATTY FEES & COSTS WILL BE WAIVED.

JUDGE DONALDSON, MLYON,REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE,CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, ARNOLD EVJE ATTY FOR PLTF, DEFT IN PRO PER, CASE SETTLED TERMS READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF & AGAINST DEFT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 641 O'FARRELL ST, #508, SF; FORF OF RENTAL AGREEMENT; LANDLORD MAY POST EVICTION NOTICE BUT STYD TO 9/26/97 AT 5PM; WRIT TO BE EXCUTED IF DEFT FAILS TO VAC; $1962.29 RENTS/DAM UP TO AND INCLUDING 9/26/97 TO BE PAID IN MONTHLY INSTLLMTS OF $100. PER MONTH BEGINNING 11/1/97 & THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER;ANY PERSONAL PROP LEFT ON PREMISES MAY BE DEEMED ABANDONED;EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS IF DEFT COMPLYS WITH SAID AGREEMENT; IF DEFT FAILS PLTF WILL BE ENTITLED TO ATTY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $650; PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
